---
title: "Academics"
---

## Education Details

*   **B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence** (2024 - Present)  
    *Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Gandhinagar*  
*   **Class XII (Senior Secondary, PCM)** (2023 - 2024)  
    *BAPS Swaminarayan Vidhyamandir, Gondal*  
*   **Class X (Secondary)** (2021 - 2022)  
    *Bhavaguru Vidhyalaya, Surendranagar*
